resposta:
solution:
```
class Solution:
    def maxScoreSightseeingPair(self, values: List[int]) -> int:
        max_score = float('-inf')
        max_val_plus_i = values[0] + 0
        for i in range(1, len(values)):
            max_score = max(max_score, max_val_plus_i + values[i] - i)
            max_val_plus_i = max(max_val_plus_i, values[i] + i)
        return max_score
```
efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(n)
space complexity: O(1)
energy implications: LOW
explanation: This solution uses a single pass through the array, maintaining the maximum score and the maximum value plus index seen so far.
